title: DiffReview Walkthrough
description: Guided review walkthrough of a set of changes, consumed by the DiffReview Neovim plugin. Lives at the repository root as .walkthrough.json.

flow.description: Compact data-flow graph rendered in the walkthrough summary. Use one primary root when possible and branch only where data splits to multiple consumers.

overview.description: Shown before the graph: 1-3 sentences explaining what changed and why.

root.description: Active author-context sentence for the top-level feature, fix, or refactor.

commit.description: Full sha of HEAD at generation time (git rev-parse HEAD). Used for staleness detection; positions describe the working tree as it existed on top of this commit.

tasks.description: Major architectural review claims. Each task title becomes a numbered review section and Task N.* navigation context.

text.description: One compact runtime/data-flow node label. Do not include a file path.

children.description: Next data-flow nodes or branch consumers.

title.description: Active architectural review claim naming the responsibility shift, boundary, or capability being reviewed.

justification.description: Optional intent/rationale shown under the task title. Prefer explaining what is now different and why the change follows.

title.description: Prose intent row under a task; explains the local purpose served by the concrete changes.

justification.description: Optional intent/rationale shown under the subtask title. Use only for non-obvious local rationale.

role.description: Optional code-proven role label such as Cache, Adapter, or Middleware. Use only when an implemented trait/interface, base class, framework registration, or strong repo convention proves the role; the summary renders this instead of the broad kind keyword.

target.description: Story node or concrete code symbol in the expanded graph.

note.description: Short imperative note explaining what this node does in the change.

file.description: Repo-relative path with forward slashes for the current file line where DiffReview places the optional annotation.

line.description: 1-based line in the NEW (post-change) file where DiffReview places the optional annotation.

annotation.description: Optional reviewer comment for this change. Omit when the change is summary-only.

changeKind.description: Broad programming or review artifact rendered as a lowercase keyword between the action and change target unless role is set. Function and Method both render as fn.

title.description: Succinct active action sentence for the inline annotation header, e.g. Emit draft changes before persistence.

comment.description: Mini justification for this annotation: problem or pressure first, then the solution/change and why it addresses that problem. Do not repeat the file path.
